content: Hi, I'm Ezra, nice to talk to you. I've been volunteering at a local animal shelter on weekends and it's been really rewarding.
Hi Ezra, that's great to hear! Volunteering at an animal shelter can be a really fulfilling experience. What made you decide to start volunteering there?

I've always loved animals, and I had some extra time on my hands, so I thought it would be a good way to give back to the community. Plus, it's a great way to get some exercise and fresh air, you know, hiking around the shelter and playing with the dogs.
That sounds amazing. I've heard that hiking can be a great way to clear your mind and get some exercise. Do you have any pets of your own?
Yeah, I have a dog named Max, he's a golden retriever. He's such a sweet boy, and he loves going on hikes with me. I also have a few cats, Luna and Leo, they're always getting into trouble.
That sounds like a fun household! I'm sure Max, Luna, and Leo keep you on your toes. What do you do for work, if you don't mind me asking?
I'm an indie game developer, so I get to spend most of my time creating games and working on new projects. It's a lot of fun, but it can be challenging at times.
That's really cool! I've always been interested in game development. What kind of games do you like to create?
I mostly work on puzzle games, but I've been thinking about creating a game that incorporates photography, since I'm also really into drone photography.
That sounds like a great idea! Photography and drone photography can be a lot of fun. Have you had a chance to work on any new projects recently?
Actually, yes! I've been working on a new game that I'm hoping to release by the end of the year, around December 15th. It's still in the early stages, but I'm really excited about it.
That's great to hear! I'm sure it'll be a lot of fun. Do you have any plans for the holidays, or are you going to be working on your game?

I'll probably be spending some time with my family and friends, but I'll also be working on my game. I'm planning on taking a trip to Japan on January 2nd, to get some inspiration for my game and to see my friend, Yui.
That sounds like a great trip! Japan is a beautiful country, and I'm sure you'll have a lot of fun. What are you most looking forward to about the trip?
I'm really looking forward to trying all the different foods, and visiting the mountains and forests. I've heard that the hiking trails in Japan are amazing.
The food and scenery in Japan are definitely worth experiencing. I'm sure you'll have a great time, and it'll be a nice break from working on your game.
Yeah, I'm really looking forward to it. Thanks for chatting with me, it was nice talking to you.
You too, Ezra! It was great talking to you, and I hope you have a great trip to Japan.
Thanks, I will. Take care!
You too, take care.
